metadata.title: Quick Double Kill From an Unexpected Angle in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Caught the enemies off guard with a sharp peek and clean shots. That split-second decision made all the difference here.
What’s your favorite sneaky spot to surprise foes?
Let me know your clutch moments!

Drop your best clutch plays in the comments!
